products.name: Maxxed Remote
products.notes: The signed Android build is in release preparation while television compatibility and store materials are verified.

products.name: Maxxed Compass
products.notes: Core navigation and sky features are in release preparation while outdoor heading, notification, recovery, distance, sky comparison, and battery checks continue.

products.name: Maxxed Measure
products.notes: Camera preview, calibration, correction, history, export, and known-object validation are moving through active development.

products.name: Maxxed Gold Estimator
products.notes: The visual-estimate workflow is implemented and is moving through automated checks, signed build work, physical fixture testing, and final disclosures.

products.name: Fishing Maxxed
products.notes: Functional source is present and moving through build, signing, known-object testing, device evidence, and regulation-source verification.

products.name: Rival Rush
products.notes: The Android build is in Google Play internal testing while UX, credits, navigation, and Word Rush receive final polish.

products.name: Contract Extractor
products.notes: Contract Extractor v1.2.0 is committed to the org repo and moved to testing after clean clone validation passed.

products.name: WordPress Bulk Content Cleanup
products.notes: Seeded admin product record for WordPress cleanup workflow tracking.
